Always-on services have solid borders. Profile-gated services show their compose profile.

g.text: Docker Compose network — in-network DNS uses service name
in-process DuckDB (duckdb-go CGO) — one instance per source · 3 sources
LOAD quack · CREATE OR REPLACE SECRET (TYPE quack, TOKEN '...') · ATTACH 'quack:<server>:9494'
policy: max_rows, timeout, statement validator · push_down_to_remote for cross-table joins
